commands.review_summary:
The branch replaces the old in-process SSRF guarded-fetch surface with centralized HTTP egress helpers, migrates fetch call sites, removes `openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime`, and updates docs/tests around proxy-owned egress control.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor/security-boundary PR, so the key evidence is source inspection and after-change real behavior proof rather than reproducing a reported bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide whether to accept the SDK break and new proxy-owned SSRF boundary, or require a deprecated adapter and upgrade path before merge.
